title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Apollo Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Apollo Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!
